epic: Admin panel — translate all Romanian UI text to English

stories.title: Translate layout.ts + index.ts to English
stories.description:
Translate all Romanian UI text in the admin layout and dashboard/content-generation pages to English.

Files: src/worker/admin/layout.ts, src/worker/admin/index.ts

In layout.ts:
- Line 2: 'Campanii' -> 'Campaigns'
- Line 3: 'Drafturi' -> 'Drafts'
- Line 4: 'Scraper-e' -> 'Scrapers'
- Line 5: 'Ponderi' -> 'Weights'
- Line 6: 'Traduceri' -> 'Translations'
- Line 8: 'Rapoarte trad.' -> 'Translation Reports'
- Line 9: 'Generare AI' -> 'AI Generation'
- Line 32: <html lang="ro"> -> <html lang="en">

In index.ts:
- Line 37: 'Campanii totale' -> 'Total Campaigns'
- Line 41: 'Drafturi in asteptare' -> 'Pending Drafts'
- Line 45: 'Rulari scraper azi' -> 'Scraper Runs Today'
- Line 49: 'Erori scraper' -> 'Scraper Errors'
- Line 54: 'Bun venit, ${email}' -> 'Welcome, ${email}'
- Line 55: 'Panoul de administrare este in constructie. Foloseste navigatia din stanga pentru a accesa sectiunile disponibile.' -> 'The admin panel is under construction. Use the navigation on the left to access available sections.'
- Line 137: 'Generare articol AI' -> 'AI Article Generation'
- Line 140: 'Categorie' -> 'Category'
- Line 141-147: option labels: 'Amenintari' -> 'Threats', 'Ghid de protectie' -> 'Protection Guide', 'Educatie' -> 'Education', 'Povesti' -> 'Stories', 'Rapoarte' -> 'Reports'
- Line 150: 'Subiect personalizat (optional)' -> 'Custom Topic (optional)'
- Line 151: placeholder 'Lasa gol pentru a genera automat...' -> 'Leave blank to auto-generate...'
- Line 152: 'Daca specifici un subiect, pasul de generare titlu este omis.' -> 'If you specify a topic, the title generation step is skipped.'
- Line 154: 'Genereaza' -> 'Generate'
- Line 185: 'Se genereaza...' -> 'Generating...'
- Line 202: 'Draft generat: ' -> 'Draft generated: '
- Line 207: 'Eroare: ' -> 'Error: '
- Line 211: 'Eroare retea: ' -> 'Network error: '
- Line 214: 'Genereaza' (button reset text) -> 'Generate'
- Line 105-111: categoryLabels object: amenintari -> 'Threats', ghid -> 'Protection Guide', educatie -> 'Education', povesti -> 'Stories', rapoarte -> 'Reports'
- Line 161: 'Drafturi AI recente' -> 'Recent AI Drafts'
- Line 163-169: table headers: 'Titlu' -> 'Title', 'Categorie' -> 'Category', 'Data' -> 'Date', 'Actiuni' -> 'Actions'
- Line 132: 'Niciun draft generat inca.' -> 'No drafts generated yet.'
- Line 130: 'Vizualizeaza' -> 'View'
- Line 220: adminLayout title 'Generare Continut AI' -> 'AI Content Generation'

Do NOT change route paths (keep /campanii, /ponderi etc.).
Do NOT change nav key identifiers.
Only change user-visible labels and text.

Verify: npx tsc --noEmit && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose
acceptance_criteria: All Romanian text in layout.ts replaced with English
All Romanian text in index.ts replaced with English
html lang attribute is 'en'
Route paths unchanged
TypeScript compiles
Tests pass

stories.title: Translate campaigns.ts + drafts.ts + weights.ts to English
stories.description:

In weights.ts:

- Line 13: 'VirusTotal (suspect)' -> 'VirusTotal (suspicious)'
- Line 14: 'Domeniu < 30 zile' -> 'Domain < 30 days'

- Line 17: 'Domeniu lung' -> 'Long Domain'
- Line 18: 'Multe cifre' -> 'Many Digits'
- Line 19: 'Prea multe subdomenii' -> 'Too Many Subdomains'
- Line 22: 'TLD suspect' -> 'Suspicious TLD'
- Line 56-59: table headers: 'Indicator' -> 'Indicator', 'Valoare' -> 'Value', 'Default' -> 'Default', 'Numeric' -> 'Numeric'
- Line 67-68: date format: toLocaleString('ro-RO') -> toLocaleString('en-US') or just toISOString()
- Line 69: 'Niciun istoric' -> 'No history'
- Line 75: 'Salveaza ponderi' -> 'Save Weights'
- Line 76: 'Reseteaza la default' -> 'Reset to Default'
- Line 82: 'Testeaza URL' -> 'Test URL'
- Line 91: 'Testeaza' button -> 'Test'
- Line 97: 'Istoric modificari (ultimele 10)' -> 'Change History (last 10)'
- Line 100-101: table headers: 'Data' -> 'Date', 'Valori salvate' -> 'Saved Values'

- Line 146: 'Ponderi salvate cu succes.' -> 'Weights saved successfully.'
- Line 156: 'Introduti un URL pentru testare.' -> 'Enter a URL to test.'
- Line 170: 'URL invalid.' -> 'Invalid URL.'
- Line 193: 'Niciun flag activ' -> 'No active flags'
- Line 198: 'Scor curent' -> 'Current Score'
- Line 202: 'Scor propus' -> 'Proposed Score'
- Line 206: 'Factor' -> 'Factor', 'Contributie' -> 'Contribution'

Do NOT change route paths or JS variable names.

Verify: npx tsc --noEmit && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose
acceptance_criteria: All Romanian text in campaigns.ts replaced with English
All Romanian text in drafts.ts replaced with English
All Romanian text in weights.ts replaced with English
Route paths unchanged
TypeScript compiles
Tests pass
